name: Zijian Xiong
institution: Huazhong University of Science and Technology
profile_summary: Researcher focused on hardware-software co-design for Compute-in-Memory architecture, memristor devices, and the tooling needed to reason about CIM compiler and IR stacks.
research_focus: Compute-in-Memory architecture and compiler/IR stack analysis
Hardware-software co-design for efficient AI acceleration
Memristor and 2D-material device behavior for brain-inspired computing
Static research tooling for paper corpora, taxonomies, and project atlases

University of Science and Technology of China
